tools.name: smsConversion.postSms
tools.description: Send a Conversion API request with information about the SMS message identified by `message-id`. Nexmo uses your conversion data and internal information about `message-id` to help improve our routing of messages in the future.

tools.name: voiceConversion.postVoice
tools.description: Send a Conversion API request with information about the Call or Text-To-Speech identified by `message-id`. Nexmo uses your conversion data and internal information about `message-id` to help improve our routing of messages in the future.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
